questions.question: What is a point in geometry?
options: A location in space with no dimensions
A line with length
A flat surface
A solid object

questions.question: What is a line?
options: A straight path that extends infinitely in both directions
A straight path with two endpoints
A flat surface
A curved path

questions.question: What is a line segment?
options: A straight path that extends infinitely in both directions
A part of a line with two endpoints
A flat surface
A curved path

questions.question: What is a ray?
options: A straight path that extends infinitely in both directions
A part of a line with one endpoint
A flat surface
A curved path

questions.question: What is an angle?
options: A figure formed by two rays with a common endpoint
A straight line
A circle
A triangle

questions.question: What is a right angle?
options: An angle of 45 degrees
An angle of 90 degrees
An angle of 180 degrees
An angle of 360 degrees

questions.question: What is an acute angle?
options: An angle less than 90 degrees
An angle greater than 90 degrees
An angle equal to 90 degrees
An angle equal to 180 degrees

questions.question: What is an obtuse angle?
options: An angle less than 90 degrees
An angle greater than 90 degrees but less than 180 degrees
An angle equal to 90 degrees
An angle equal to 180 degrees

questions.question: What is a straight angle?
options: An angle of 45 degrees
An angle of 90 degrees
An angle of 180 degrees
An angle of 360 degrees

questions.question: What is a reflex angle?
options: An angle less than 90 degrees
An angle greater than 180 degrees but less than 360 degrees
An angle equal to 180 degrees
An angle equal to 360 degrees

questions.question: What is a complete angle?
options: An angle of 45 degrees
An angle of 90 degrees
An angle of 180 degrees
An angle of 360 degrees

questions.question: What is a triangle?
options: A polygon with 3 sides
A polygon with 4 sides
A polygon with 5 sides
A polygon with 6 sides

questions.question: What is the sum of interior angles of a triangle?
options: 90 degrees
180 degrees
270 degrees
360 degrees

questions.question: What is an equilateral triangle?
options: A triangle with all sides equal
A triangle with two equal sides
A triangle with no equal sides
A triangle with a right angle

questions.question: What is an isosceles triangle?
options: A triangle with all sides equal
A triangle with two equal sides
A triangle with no equal sides
A triangle with a right angle

questions.question: What is a scalene triangle?
options: A triangle with all sides equal
A triangle with two equal sides
A triangle with no equal sides
A triangle with a right angle

questions.question: What is a right-angled triangle?
options: A triangle with one angle equal to 90 degrees
A triangle with all angles equal
A triangle with two equal sides
A triangle with no equal sides

questions.question: What is a quadrilateral?
options: A polygon with 3 sides
A polygon with 4 sides
A polygon with 5 sides
A polygon with 6 sides

questions.question: What is the sum of interior angles of a quadrilateral?
options: 180 degrees
270 degrees
360 degrees
450 degrees

questions.question: What is a square?
options: A quadrilateral with all sides equal and all angles 90 degrees
A quadrilateral with opposite sides equal
A quadrilateral with no equal sides
A quadrilateral with one pair of parallel sides

questions.question: What is a rectangle?
options: A quadrilateral with all sides equal
A quadrilateral with opposite sides equal and all angles 90 degrees
A quadrilateral with all angles 90 degrees but sides not equal
A quadrilateral with no equal sides

questions.question: What is a parallelogram?
options: A quadrilateral with opposite sides parallel
A quadrilateral with all sides equal
A quadrilateral with all angles 90 degrees
A quadrilateral with no parallel sides

questions.question: What is a rhombus?
options: A quadrilateral with all sides equal but angles not 90 degrees
A quadrilateral with all sides equal and all angles 90 degrees
A quadrilateral with opposite sides parallel
A quadrilateral with no equal sides

questions.question: What is a trapezium?
options: A quadrilateral with one pair of parallel sides
A quadrilateral with all sides equal
A quadrilateral with all angles 90 degrees
A quadrilateral with no parallel sides

questions.question: What is a circle?
options: A set of points equidistant from a center point
A polygon with 4 sides
A triangle
A straight line

questions.question: What is the radius of a circle?
options: The distance from the center to any point on the circle
The distance across the circle through the center
The distance around the circle
The area inside the circle

questions.question: What is the diameter of a circle?
options: The distance from the center to any point on the circle
The distance across the circle through the center
The distance around the circle
The area inside the circle

questions.question: What is the circumference of a circle?
options: The distance from the center to any point on the circle
The distance across the circle through the center
The distance around the circle
The area inside the circle

questions.question: What is the formula for the circumference of a circle?
options: 2πr
πr^2
2πr^2
πd^2

questions.question: What is the formula for the area of a circle?
options: 2πr
πr^2
2πr^2
πd^2

questions.question: What is the value of π (pi)?
What is the Pythagorean theorem?
options: a + b = c
a × b = c^2

questions.question: What is a chord of a circle?
options: A line segment joining two points on the circle
A line that touches the circle at one point
A line that passes through the center
The distance around the circle

questions.question: What is a tangent to a circle?
options: A line segment joining two points on the circle
A line that touches the circle at exactly one point
A line that passes through the center
The distance around the circle

questions.question: What is a secant of a circle?
options: A line that intersects the circle at two points
A line that touches the circle at one point
A line that passes through the center
The distance around the circle

questions.question: What is a polygon?
options: A closed figure made of line segments
A curved figure
A circle
A triangle only

questions.question: What is a regular polygon?
options: A polygon with all sides and angles equal
A polygon with all sides equal but angles not equal
A polygon with all angles equal but sides not equal
A polygon with no equal sides

questions.question: What is an irregular polygon?
options: A polygon with all sides and angles equal
A polygon with sides and angles not equal
A polygon with all sides equal
A polygon with all angles equal

questions.question: What is a diagonal of a polygon?
options: A line segment joining two non-consecutive vertices
A line segment joining two consecutive vertices
A line that passes through the center
The perimeter of the polygon

questions.question: What is the sum of interior angles of a pentagon?
options: 360 degrees
450 degrees
540 degrees
630 degrees

questions.question: What is the sum of interior angles of a hexagon?
options: 540 degrees
600 degrees
660 degrees
720 degrees

questions.question: What is a congruent figure?
options: Figures with the same shape and size
Figures with the same shape but different size
Figures with the same size but different shape
Figures with different shape and size

questions.question: What is a similar figure?
options: Figures with the same shape and size
Figures with the same shape but different size
Figures with the same size but different shape
Figures with different shape and size

questions.question: What is a sphere?
options: A 3D shape with all points equidistant from the center
A 3D shape with 6 square faces
A 3D shape with a circular base
A 3D shape with 4 triangular faces

questions.question: What is a cube?
options: A 3D shape with all points equidistant from the center
A 3D shape with 6 square faces
A 3D shape with a circular base
A 3D shape with 4 triangular faces

questions.question: What is a cylinder?
options: A 3D shape with all points equidistant from the center
A 3D shape with 6 square faces
A 3D shape with two circular bases
A 3D shape with 4 triangular faces

questions.question: What is a cone?
options: A 3D shape with a circular base and a curved surface meeting at a point
A 3D shape with 6 square faces
A 3D shape with two circular bases
A 3D shape with all points equidistant from the center

questions.question: What is a pyramid?
options: A 3D shape with a polygonal base and triangular faces meeting at a point
A 3D shape with 6 square faces
A 3D shape with two circular bases
A 3D shape with all points equidistant from the center

questions.question: What is a prism?
options: A 3D shape with two parallel identical bases
A 3D shape with a circular base
A 3D shape with all points equidistant from the center
A 3D shape with 4 triangular faces

questions.question: What is an axis of symmetry?
options: A line that divides a figure into two mirror-image halves
A line that passes through the center
A line that intersects the figure at two points
A line that touches the figure at one point

questions.question: What is a perpendicular line?
options: Two lines that intersect at right angles
Two lines that never intersect
Two lines that intersect at any angle
Two lines that are parallel

questions.question: What is a parallel line?
options: Two lines that intersect at right angles
Two lines that never intersect
Two lines that intersect at any angle
Two lines that are perpendicular
